articles.title: Intel CPUs Set to Power Googlebook Laptops, with "Wildcat Lake" in Play - TechPowerUp
articles.description: Google launched its "Googlebook" laptops yesterday, introducing a new intelligent platform that leverages Gemini AI, succeeding its Chromebook offerings. Initially, it was unclear what hardware Google would use for its upcoming laptop models. However, Intel a…
